entities.name: Aggressive Contradiction Detection
entities.context: Technique for continuously scanning for logical inconsistencies, conflicting assumptions, and premises that can't coexist

entities.name: Devil's Advocate Mode
entities.context: Approach that proactively argues against ideas by identifying failure modes, hidden assumptions, and counterarguments

entities.name: Synthesis
entities.context: Process of combining insights, only performed when exploration is deemed complete

entities.name: Speed optimization
entities.context: Strategic focus on reducing time-to-hire as primary metric

entities.name: Quality optimization
entities.context: Strategic focus on quality of hire as the differentiator

entities.name: Hidden assumptions
entities.context: Unstated premises that must hold for an idea or strategy to work

relationships.context: Both are critical thinking techniques for stress-testing ideas
Creates fundamental tension - optimizing for one may compromise the other
Identifying hidden assumptions is core function of devil's advocate approach
Contradiction detection informs when and how synthesis should occur
